zh.lifeSummary: 當Gruffydd ap Gwilym of Penrhyn於1322年出生在威爾士凱爾納方史爾白 康維時，他的父親Gwilym ap Gruffydd22歲，母親Efa verch Griffith ap Tudur29歲。他於1355年之前與Generys ferch Madog在威爾士凱爾納方史爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1405年在他的家鄉享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gruffydd ap Gwilym of Penrhyn于1322年出生在威尔士凱爾納方史爾白 康維时，他的父亲Gwilym ap Gruffydd22岁，母亲Efa verch Griffith ap Tudur29岁。他于1355年之前与Generys ferch Madog在威尔士凱爾納方史爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1405年在他的家乡享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Long, Minh, Muoi, Phan, Phat, Vinh, Cuong, Hien, Hoa, Lam, Lan.  Chinese Wing, Chi, Kin, Cheuk, Chi Wai, Chuen, Hon, Keung, Wah, Wai, Chiu, Ho.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 敖, see   Ao  .
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Auerbach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Moshe, Emanuel, Isidor, Bronia, Chaim, Faigy, Menachem, Meyer, Yechezkel.
German: habitational name from any of several places in southern Germany and Austria called Auerbach ‘the stream at the water meadow’. See also 2,   Au  , and   Bach  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Auerbach in the Upper Palatinate, Bavaria. Compare   Averbach  .

variants.name: Ao
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 敖, meaning both ‘rambling’ and ‘deposed king without posthumous titles’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Tai Ao (太敖), teacher of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437 BC ). (ii) it is said that the surname is also borne by descendants of deposed kings of the former state of Chu, with no posthumous titles, during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ).

variants.name: Auer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hans, Erwin, Matthias, Siegfried, Bernd, Bernhard, Erna, Franz, Fritz, Hermann, Horst.

German (mainly Bavaria): topographic name for someone living by a water meadow, German Au, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Au or Aue (see Au and Aue ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, and Slovenia.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

en.lifeSummary: When Gruffydd ap Gwilym of Penrhyn was born in 1322, in Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Wales, his father, Gwilym ap Gruffydd, was 22 and his mother, Efa verch Griffith ap Tudur, was 29. He married Generys ferch Madog before 1355, in Caernarfonshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1405, in his hometown, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gruffydd ap Gwilym of Penrhyn est né en 1322, à Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Galles, son père, Gwilym ap Gruffydd, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Efa verch Griffith ap Tudur, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Generys ferch Madog avant 1355, à Caernarfonshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1405, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gruffydd ap Gwilym of Penrhyn 1322 in Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gwilym ap Gruffydd 22 und seine Mutter Efa verch Griffith ap Tudur 29. Er hat vor 1355 in Caernarfonshire, Wales Generys ferch Madog geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1405 im Alter von 83 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffydd ap Gwilym of Penrhyn è nato il nel 1322 nel Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Galles, il suo padre, Gwilym ap Gruffydd, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Efa verch Griffith ap Tudur, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Generys ferch Madog prima del 1355, nel Caernarfonshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1405, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gruffydd ap Gwilym of Penrhynが1322年にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアペンルhイン ビー コンワイで生まれた時，父Gwilym ap Gruffyddは22歳，母Efa verch Griffith ap Tudurは29歳であった。1355年以前にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアでGenerys ferch Madogと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1405年に故郷で83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gruffydd ap Gwilym of Penrhyn(이)가 1322년 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 펜히 비 콘웨이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gwilym ap Gruffydd(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Efa verch Griffith ap Tudur(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1355년 이전 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르에서 Generys ferch Madog(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1405년 그의 고향에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffydd ap Gwilym of Penrhyn nasceu em 1322, em Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Gales, seu pai, Gwilym ap Gruffydd, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Efa verch Griffith ap Tudur, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Generys ferch Madog antes 1355, em Caernarfonshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1405, em sua cidade natal, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gruffydd ap Gwilym of Penrhyn родился в 1322 г. в местности пенрин би конвеи, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Gwilym ap Gruffydd было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Efa verch Griffith ap Tudur, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Generys ferch Madog перед 1355 г. в местности каирнарфоншир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1405 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gruffydd ap Gwilym of Penrhyn nació en 1322, en Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Gales, su papá, Gwilym ap Gruffydd, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Efa verch Griffith ap Tudur, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Generys ferch Madog antes de 1355, en Caernarfonshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1405, en su pueblo, a la edad de 83 años.
